verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_5: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,
verse.verse_6: And the stars and trees prostrate.
verse.verse_7: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance
verse.verse_8: That you not transgress within the balance.
verse.verse_9: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance.
verse.verse_10: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.
verse.verse_11: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
verse.verse_12: And grain having husks and scented plants.
verse.verse_13: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_14: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.
verse.verse_15: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
verse.verse_16: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_17: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.
verse.verse_18: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_19: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];
verse.verse_20: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.
verse.verse_21: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_22: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.
verse.verse_23: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_24: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.
verse.verse_25: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_26: Everyone upon the earth will perish,
verse.verse_27: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
verse.verse_28: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_29: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.
verse.verse_30: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_31: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.
verse.verse_32: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_33: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah].
verse.verse_34: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_35: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves.
verse.verse_36: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_37: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil -
verse.verse_38: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_39: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.
verse.verse_40: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_41: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.
verse.verse_42: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_43: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.
verse.verse_44: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].
verse.verse_45: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_46: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -
verse.verse_47: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_49: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_50: In both of them are two springs, flowing.
verse.verse_51: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_52: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.
verse.verse_53: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_54: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.
verse.verse_55: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_56: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -
verse.verse_57: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_58: As if they were rubies and coral.
verse.verse_59: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_60: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?
verse.verse_61: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_62: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -
verse.verse_63: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_65: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_66: In both of them are two springs, spouting.
verse.verse_67: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_68: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.
verse.verse_69: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_70: In them are good and beautiful women -
verse.verse_71: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_73: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_74: Untouched before them by man or jinni -
verse.verse_75: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
verse.verse_76: Reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets.
verse.verse_77: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
verse.verse_78: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
